info.description: Programmatic access to your Omi data - memories, conversations, action items, goals, folders, and API keys. Build custom integrations, analytics dashboards, and automation workflows.
info.title: Omi Integration API

get.description:
Get all conversations for a user via integration API.
Authentication is required via API key in the Authorization header.

Optional date range filtering:
- start_date: Filter conversations after this date (ISO format)
- end_date: Filter conversations before this date (ISO format)

parameters.description: Filter conversations after this date (ISO format)
parameters.name: start_date

schema.description: Filter conversations after this date (ISO format)
schema.title: Start Date

parameters.description: Filter conversations before this date (ISO format)
parameters.name: end_date

schema.description: Filter conversations before this date (ISO format)
schema.title: End Date

parameters.description: Maximum number of transcript segments to include per conversation. Use -1 for no limit.
parameters.name: max_transcript_segments

schema.description: Maximum number of transcript segments to include per conversation. Use -1 for no limit.
schema.title: Max Transcript Segments

get.description:
Get all memories (facts) for a user via integration API.
Authentication is required via API key in the Authorization header.

post.description:
Search conversations for a user via integration API.
Authentication is required via API key in the Authorization header.

parameters.description: Maximum number of transcript segments to include per conversation. Use -1 for no limit.
parameters.name: max_transcript_segments

schema.description: Maximum number of transcript segments to include per conversation. Use -1 for no limit.
schema.title: Max Transcript Segments

get.description:
Get all tasks (action items) for a user via integration API.
Authentication is required via API key in the Authorization header.

Optional filters:
- **completed**: Filter by completion status (true/false/null for all)
- **conversation_id**: Filter by conversation ID
- **start_date**: Filter by creation start date (ISO format or YYYY-MM-DD)
- **end_date**: Filter by creation end date (ISO format or YYYY-MM-DD)
- **due_start_date**:  Filter by due start date (ISO format or YYYY-MM-DD)
- **due_end_date**: Filter by due end date (ISO format or YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.description: Filter by creation start date (ISO format or YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: start_date

schema.description: Filter by creation start date (ISO format or YYYY-MM-DD)
schema.title: Start Date

parameters.description: Filter by creation end date (ISO format or YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: end_date

schema.description: Filter by creation end date (ISO format or YYYY-MM-DD)
schema.title: End Date

parameters.description: Filter by due start date (ISO format or YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: due_start_date

schema.description: Filter by due start date (ISO format or YYYY-MM-DD)
schema.title: Due Start Date

parameters.description: Filter by due end date (ISO format or YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: due_end_date

schema.description: Filter by due end date (ISO format or YYYY-MM-DD)
schema.title: Due End Date
